title: FiddlePack
description: This is a Vanilla+ Modpack that adds lots of quality of life features.
body:
## Increase in Performance

I have added a few mods, which increase performance. This allows the game to be run even on older machines.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- full control over rendering of all particles
- reduce load on the computer when running in the background

</details>




## More Ambience

To combat the lack of ambience in the basegame I added several mods. Sounds of exotic birds in the jungle, the echoing of your steps in the caves or leaves dropping from trees. All this adds to the feel of the game.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- biome based ambient noises
- distored sounds under water, echos in caves
- particle leaves
- first person model of the player
- more player animations
- 3D rendering for playermodels (includes player heads)
- shader support
- beautiful clouds
- particle based rain
- proxy voicechat (needs to be installed and configured on the server)

</details>




## Quality of Life

Did you ever want to know, where this creeper is spawning in your base? Why your mobfarm won't spawn monsters? What area is covered by your beacons? This modpack comes with the ability to tell you all that and more.


<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- customisable F3 screen
- auto-refill the hotbar
- lightlevel rendering
- detailed shulkerbox tooltips
- itemcounter and better interface for bundles
- visible satuation
- improved item interactions in the inventory
- searchbar for hotkeys
- customisable minimap
- customisable zoom
- many more...

</details>
